cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Gurdeep Kaur Dhillon? Sir, this is Utkarsh Small Finance Bank. I am calling regarding your upcoming joining on next week.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes. I'm Gurdeep. Achha, what's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We are excited to have you on board. I am calling to guide you through our onboarding process and the necessary documents you need to bring on your first day.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. What documents do I need to bring?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You will need to bring your identification proof, address proof, and your qualification certificates. Also, please ensure you have a copy of your offer letter.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, got it. And what's the process like on the first day?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: On your first day, you will be meeting with our HR team, and we will be providing you with all the necessary information about the company policies and your role.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds good. Is there anything else I need to do before joining?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 78s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An HR representative calls a new hire a week before their joining date to provide information about the onboarding process and the documents they need to bring on their first day.
